series_metadata.series_description: When the state issues lease-appropriation bonds, the benefitting state agencies (either Department of Rehabilitation & Corrections (DRC) or Department of Youth Services (DYS)) may enter into subleases with local governments to facilitate funding assistance to local correctional facilities. One sublease may apply to multiple bond issuances.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for duration of corresponding bond issuance with the latest destruction date. See DEBT-3. ; Electronic: Retain for duration of corresponding bond issuance with the latest destruction date. See DEBT-3., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
